dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7732 IH: Promoting Innovation in Blockchain Development Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Fitzgerald (for himself, Ms. Lofgren, and Mr. Cline) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend section 1960(a) of title 18, United States Code.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Promoting Innovation in Blockchain Development Act.
Section 1960(a) of title 18, United States Code, is amended by inserting exercises control over currency, funds, or other value that substitutes for currency, and after Whoever knowingly.
